rows.notes: Consensus between gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku. Both extractors accurately identified the year header with no associated amounts.

rows.description: Domus Fund payment on acct of
rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini's description as it accurately matches the image ('Domus' and 'acct'), correcting claude-haiku's typos ('Dormus', 'act'). Both agreed on row type and no amounts.
Only gpt-5-mini extracted this row. Visual verification confirms description and amounts: £2045 7s 2d. claude-haiku completely missed this row, leading to a subsequent misalignment of its entries.

Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'Candy from Dec 21 to Jan 31' and amount '17s 3.5d'. claude-haiku misread the description (date wrong) and provided an entirely incorrect amount, suggesting severe misalignment or hallucination for this entry.
Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description and amount: £1 1s 8d. claude-haiku provided an irrelevant description and incorrect amount ('Coals from Feb 16 March 25 1 7 8').

Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description and amount: £1 8s 11.5d. claude-haiku misread the shillings and pence values and missed the halfpenny fraction, despite matching the description text.

Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'College Garden' and amount £13 13s 0d. claude-haiku misread 'College' as 'Colley's' and incorrectly placed '13' in the pence column, which is invalid (disqualified by hard rule).
Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description and amount: £3 3s 0d. claude-haiku incorrectly placed the values in shillings and pence columns.

Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'Freige farm outlet for Water' and amount: £21 2s 9d. claude-haiku misread 'Frieze' for 'Freige' and incorrectly extracted the monetary values, inventing a fraction not present.

Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'Kidlington vic & repairs' as a header with no amounts. claude-haiku failed to identify this header and instead hallucinated an unrelated entry ('Eddington Lic...') with an invalid pence value.

Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'Osborne on acct' and amount £25 0s 0d. claude-haiku misread 'acct' as 'or Act' and provided an invalid pence value of 30, failing the hard rule filter.
Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'Hill do' and amount £30 0s 0d. claude-haiku misread the description ('Hell or') and provided an invalid pence value of 30.
Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'Roby do' and amount £30 0s 0d. claude-haiku misread the description ('Robey or') and provided an invalid pence value of 30.

Overrode both extractors. Visual verification shows description 'Salvatici'. The ledger shows '3' in pounds, '10' in shillings, and '15' in pence. claude-haiku was disqualified for outputting invalid pence (15). gpt-5-mini made an implausible reinterpretation of the numbers (£310 15s 0d). Applying standard currency conversion for the invalid pence value, 15 pence is 1 shilling and 3 pence. Therefore, the correct amount is £3 11s 3d.
Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'Rector' and amount £73 8s 9d. claude-haiku severely misread all monetary values and incorrectly identified a fraction.

Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'Lewis. Menton Channel' and amount £3 16s 6d. claude-haiku misread the description ('dews. Multon Chancel') and provided an invalid pence value (16).

Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'Domus Wine Bottles' and amount £15 6s 6d. claude-haiku had minor typos in the description ('Dormus Wine Ballot') but correctly extracted the amount.
Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'Do. do do' and amount £15 2s 6d. claude-haiku provided an incorrect description ('br. to do') but correctly extracted the amount.
Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'Warre & Woolgrove Cheque' and amount £25 0s 0d. claude-haiku had multiple typos in description and misread the amount significantly.
Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'By value of Timber' and amount £42 7s 7d. claude-haiku misread the shillings value as '4'.

Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'Hot closet outside the Hall' and amount £22 10s 0d. claude-haiku had multiple errors in description ('Not closed outside be Hall') and misread the pounds and shillings values.
Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'Sheppard private Bills' and amount £7 17s 4d. claude-haiku misread the description ('Stephane Private Bells') and all monetary values.
Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'Braine Osborne' and amount £14 9s 0d. claude-haiku had a typo in description ('Braime Osborne') and misread pounds and shillings.
Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'Hill' and amount £18 9s 0d. claude-haiku misread 'Hill' as 'Hell' and missed the pounds value, placing the '18' in shillings.
Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'Roby' and amount £3 18s 3d. claude-haiku misread the amounts and incorrectly identified a fraction.
Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'Osborne' and amount £13 2s 0d. claude-haiku misread the pounds and shillings values.
Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'Hill' and amount £12 6s 0d. claude-haiku misread 'Hill' as 'Hell' and misidentified the pounds value as shillings.
Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'do' and amount £10 3s 0d. claude-haiku misread 'do' as 'by' and misidentified the pounds value as shillings.
Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'Brown' and amount £10 9s 0d. claude-haiku misidentified the pounds value as shillings.

Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'Painting' and amount £1 0s 0d, with a faint '1' clearly in the pounds column. claude-haiku misread 'Painting' as 'Dancing' and incorrectly placed the amount in shillings.

Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'Kidlington Cottages Commr' and amount 6s 6d. claude-haiku had minor typos in the description ('kEdington Cottage Com't') but correctly extracted the amount.

Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'Roby' and amount £2 0s 11d. claude-haiku had a minor typo in description ('Robey'). Monetary amounts were identical between both candidates.

Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'Chancel Wiliams' and amount £5 0s 0d, with '5' clearly in the pounds column. claude-haiku had a typo in description ('Wittram') and misidentified the amount as shillings.

Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'local Rate fund (auction book)' and amount £29 14s 6d. claude-haiku had inaccuracies in the description ('Castle book', missing parentheses) but correctly extracted the amount.

Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'Stamps' and amount 15s 0d. The '15' is clearly aligned under the shillings column. claude-haiku had a minor typo in the description ('Stamped') but correctly identified the amount.

Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'Stringer Comm'n on Pitt?' and amount £9 1s 6d. claude-haiku had errors in the description ('Pike') and completely misread the monetary values.

Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'Room Rent overpaid in Invt' and amount 6s 6d. claude-haiku had severe errors in the description ('Aom Rant Overpaid to Swet') but correctly extracted the amount.

Selected gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms description 'Carried forward' and amount £2774 7s 4.5d. The amount '2774' is clearly legible in the pounds column. claude-haiku misread the pounds value as '277'.
